title: Form page
description: Template for create/edit forms. Composed from reusable blocks arranged vertically inside the page shell. Add as many blocks as needed — all share the same padding, gap, and card tokens.

blocks.label: Two columns
blocks.description: Two white cards side by side. Use for grouping related fields in separate logical sections (e.g. User info + Platform access). Default proportions are equal (50/50) but can be adjusted.

blocks.label: Single column
blocks.description: One full-width white card. Use for sections that need all available horizontal space: long switch lists, rich text, custom fields, or any block that benefits from more room.

blocks.label: Inputs + Map
blocks.description: Left: labeled form inputs. Right: interactive map for geocoding or drawing geofences. Uses the DS Map component from Map Elements.

blocks.label: Permission switches
blocks.description: Full-width card with a list of toggle rows. Each row has a label, optional info icon, and a switch. Supports nested rows (indented sub-permissions) and an Activate all link.

blocks.label: Custom fields
blocks.description: Full-width card for user-defined fields (dropdowns, textareas). Fields can be grouped. Supports an Add group button at the bottom.

blocks.label: File upload
blocks.description: Single or multiple file upload block. Uses the DS File uploader component from Selection controls.
